title: Mismatch — relevant-looking resources in scope, wrong task (the negative-guard discriminator; checking is fine, fabricating is the failure)
prompt: Summarize the key terms of our employee stock option plan in this matter — vesting, cliff, and exercise window.
notes: search_documents firing here is NOT noise — verifying absence is correct behavior. read_document on the only (irrelevant) document is the wrong-grounding eagerness oscar measured (+25pp wrong-skill on MiniMax). Honest-absence substance is an L2 judge field, run only if budget allows.
